job_title: Software Development Engineer II, AI/ML Elastic Collectives - Annapurna Labs
job_nlp_title: Software Development Engineer II, AI/ML Elastic Collectives
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Software Design, Software Architecture, Linux, Python
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Software Design:1.0, Software Architecture:0.0, Linux:0.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience, 2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience, Experience programming with at least one software programming language, Knowledge of Linux fundamentals
preferred_quals: 3+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience, Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent, Knowledge of Python and/or C++ programming
core_responsibilities: Work on distributed AI/ML systems, Develop collective operations that enable AI to scale across multiple accelerators & servers, Focus on building networking solutions for Machine Learning (ML) and High-Performance Computing (HPC) workloads on AWS, Collaborate with infrastructure experts, hardware engineers, RTL engineers, scientists & architects, Provide mentorship to new and junior engineers
job_summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is seeking an experienced engineer to work on distributed AI/ML systems within Annapurna Labs. The role involves developing collective operations that enable AI to scale across multiple accelerators and servers, focusing on networking solutions for Machine Learning and High-Performance Computing workloads.
